description: As a Database Architect, reverse-engineer the LEGACY_OPS Oracle schema (T_CLI, T_ORD, T_ORD_ITM, T_PRD, T_CAT, T_EMP, T_DEPT, T_LOG) inherited from an acquisition. Add table comments for all 8 tables and column comments for at least 15 columns with meaningful descriptions. Apply primary key constraints to the tables missing them (T_CLI, T_ORD, T_PRD, T_CAT, T_EMP, T_DEPT) and establish at least 3 foreign key relationships (e.g., T_ORD.CLI_ID to T_CLI, T_ORD_ITM.ORD_ID to T_ORD, or T_PRD.CAT_ID to T_CAT). Export a schema analysis report documenting the table purposes and identified relationships to /home/ga/Documents/exports/legacy_ops_analysis.txt. Connect as legacy_ops/LegacyOps2024 or system/OraclePassword123.
